response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced senior engineer with strong full-stack, testing, and craftsmanship credentials, but he does not meet the role's core minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ experience — his C++ exposure is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments and a thesis project. His large-scale, low-latency distributed systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic was in DLang, and his cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is at application level rather than building an internal compute platform. His leadership experience is informal (workshops, mentoring, founding an open-source project) rather than the sustained technical-lead role this position requires.
strengths: Hands-on experience with high-throughput, low-latency microservices (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tools authorship
Broad polyglot experience plus community leadership through workshops, courses, and open-source projects
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8 years of C++ experience
No production-level cloud compute platform or infrastructure-team ownership experience
Lacks formal technical leadership experience managing priorities, deadlines, and cross-team alignment
